problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Combining Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
